description: Create a new invite code. Requires admin or moderator role.

main.description: Generate a new invite code with optional usage limits and expiration.

maxUses.description: Maximum number of times the invite code can be used. Defaults to 1.

expiresAt.description: Optional expiration timestamp for the invite code.

maxUses.description: Maximum number of uses for this invite code.

expiresAt.description: Expiration timestamp, or null if the code does not expire.
